---
title: "ML Research Notebook"
---

A living collection of research ideas, paper notes, and general notes for my research work. 

## Sections

**[Ideas](ideas/index.qmd)** — Research directions, hypotheses, experiment proposals, and half-baked thoughts worth capturing.

**[Paper Notes](paper-notes/index.qmd)** — Summaries, key takeaways, and critiques of papers I'm reading.

**[Notes](notes/index.qmd)** — Technical notes, experiment logs, debugging journals, and everything else.
